meaning: vt.蟒ｺ隶ｮ,謠仙倂,菴ｿ諠ｳ襍ｷ,證礼､ｺ
examples: I suggest we let the matter drop.
I suggest (that) we go out to eat.
The symptoms suggest a minor heart attack.
As ever in Japan, however, the picture is more mixed than all this would suggest.
Most models of inflation suggest the expansion would have been accompanied by ripples of gravitational energy.
